scene_title: Cranio com chip implantado na testa
narrative_beat: Chip dourado luminoso com gravuras medievais carmesim

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid human skull with luminous golden implanted chip on forehead with visible connectors and blue-gold emanating light adorned with crimson medieval engravings around the skull in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the luminous golden chip on the forehead with blue-gold light and crimson medieval engravings
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated modern surgical room with sterilized grey equipment in background
props: human skull with golden forehead chip

composition.foreground: skull and chip in vivid gold crimson

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, metallic blue-gold highlights

mood.emotion: Neuralink as literal forehead mark of Revelation 13:16

symbolism.primary: the skull wearing the mark — the ultimate convergence
symbolism.secondary: medieval engravings as the ancient text written on the modern technology

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
